title: Sake-Glazed Polish Sausage on Toast
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring polish sausage glazed with sake and served on toasted bread.
instructions: Slice the polish sausage into 1-inch pieces and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the sausage in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until browned and cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices in a toaster or under the broiler.
In a small saucepan, combine the sake and 2 tablespoons of water.
Bring the sake mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook until slightly reduced, about 5 minutes.
Brush the sake glaze over the cooked sausage and serve on top of toasted bread.
